description: Beta patch: brings the v0.5.12 workflow update fix into the 0.6 beta line.
changelog:
**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(update): update `.devflow/workflow.md` as a whole hash-tracked template so runtime phase routing markers, including Codex `codex-inline` / `codex-sub-agent` blocks, refresh during `devflow update`.
notes: Beta patch on top of 0.6.0-beta.6. Run `devflow update` to refresh hash-tracked workflow templates. No migration required.
